cad_specification:
from cadquery import Workplane

# Hexagonal nut with central threaded hole
# Overall dimensions approximately 20mm width, 8mm height
result = (
    Workplane("XY")
    # Create hexagonal profile - width across flats ~17mm
    .polygon(6, 10)
    .extrude(8)
    # Add chamfers on top and bottom edges
    .edges("|Z")
    .chamfer(0.8)
    # Cut central hole - approximately 10mm diameter
    .faces(">Z")
    .workplane()
    .hole(10)
)

result = result.val()...
